Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue; Request For Order That Pltf Pay Cost Of Transfer
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Behzad Nahai, Esq., 310-824-9000 for defendant and moving party Gold Expo, Inc.
Omar Jabbour, Esq., 415-887-7619 for plaintiff and opposing party Sysiq, Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT GOLD EXPO, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue to Los Angeles; Request For Order That Plaintiff Pay Cost Of Transfer IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT THE CONTRACT WAS TO BE PERFORMED AND THE ALLEGED BREACH OCCURRED IN SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR# 8098(301/PJBLB)
